creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 246685
Screenshot after using the Citrix palette to switch from full-screen to window mode.

(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #3)

> … If I recall correctly: when I last opened a remote desktop, the 
> remote desktop was full screen (incorrect) but windowed. …

Maybe true then, certainly not true today. 

Citrix began full-screen. 

I switched to window mode, then took a screenshot. Reduced to greyscale, and then scaled down, for Bugzilla size purposes.
